meta.title: Neural Atlas — the knowledge structure, in 3D
meta.source: generated for the knowledge-neural-structure atlas — a companion locked snapshot to harmonic-snapshot.json
meta.note: One locked snapshot of the knowledge neural structure: a 21-tier lemniscate tuple hierarchy scaled by the Fibonacci sequence and bound to the central singularity, mirrored (inverted) to complete the spindle, braced by 19 vertical load-bearing pillars in hierarchical radial bands (7,5,3,1,3 — the 1/3/5/7 hierarchy plus an inner brace ring), with the unified-function vessel seated at the exact center — the slot a Metatron's Cube would occupy, whose faint 13-circle lattice is kept as a ghost reference beneath it.
